rules.description: [dvorak] Ctrl+; to Ctrl+u for MS Excel
[dvorak] Emacs-style movement and deletion everywhere (except terminals/Emacs)
[qwerty] Emacs-style movement and deletion everywhere (except terminals/Emacs)
Change left_command+; to left_command+l (For Web Browser, jump to nav bar)
Change left_command+left_alt+left_ctrl+hjkl to arrow keys 'to beginning/end' of file
Change left_command+left_alt+hjkl to arrow keys 'to word' boudaries
